name: memorydetective
description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation. Reads .memgraph and .trace files, classifies retain cycles against a 36-pattern catalog (SwiftUI / Combine / Concurrency / UIKit / Core Animation / Core Data / SwiftData / Coordinator / RxSwift / Realm). v1.14 is the trace-side reliability + breadth release: fixes two parser bugs that were causing summarizeTrace to return empty results against real Apple traces, adds analyzeNetworkActivity (37th tool), reads hang-risks alongside potential-hangs, refactors 5 analyzers to use pattern-matching schema discovery, unifies per-area status via supportStatus[], and adds three opt-in UX paths around the macOS 26.x xctrace --time-limit regression (pre-flight probe, auto-open Instruments, README callout). Plus FLEX-inspired countAlive size view and MLeaksFinder + DebugSwift-inspired verifyFix whitelist. v1.13 shipped summarizeTrace single-call cross-schema synthesis. v1.12 completed reference-tree propagation across countAlive, findRetainers, verifyFix. v1.11 added inspectTrace, diffMemgraphs ref-tree, CLI abandoned-memory mini-table. v1.9 added analyzeAbandonedMemory, detectLeaksInXCTest, cleanupTraces, mainThreadViolations. Single-call build + boot + launch fixes the macOS 26.x leaks --outputGraph regression. Bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP. 37 MCP tools, 34 catalog resources, 6 investigation prompts.
